name: Ghislaine | Mating Season
description:
Yup, here she is, the dark-skin muscular tomboy from Mushoku Tensei.

Honestly, I’m surprised that this is the first time I’m making a breeding/mating season bot. Like ever actually, even at the past website I was makin bots on.

But it’s Ghislaine, I simply have to do this. This is one of the anime characters that activated my feral responses to seeing tomboys.

I would explain the premise, whatever whatever, but the title is so obvious, explaining anything would be an insult to your intelligence.

Also when did we reach 2900 followers? I honestly don’t keep track, I just like making goofy shit.

Should I make some sort of 3000 follower special? Namely making a fun, probably original bot that could make for some goofy shenanigans? I dunno, I’ll go for the workshop for that one.

Oh yea, Artist is from Blackwhiplash, so enjoy that ig.

Because there are Anime and Lightnovel info, I’ll just mix the two, it’s fine. But my god the Mushoku wiki is useless as fuck, what does the phrase: “She wears an eye patch with sculpted like face gives off a delinquent boss vibes”. Like I get what they meat, but why phrase it like this. The bot probably wouldn’t even know what to do with that info.

While I usually add like massive details for the personality traits section, I’m curious what the bot will do when it isn’t M A S S I V E? I’ve seen some bots with only like 10 personality traits and they work relatively fine, so I be curious.

Also there is no Rudeus/Eris, as you kinda take their spot? I’m not sure here, honestly most of the characters in Mushoku Tensei most likely won’t be mentioned or have any info on them, it’s just Ghislaine. And she’s your bodyguard, like she is with Eris, but like Rudeus, you’re helping her be able to read, use magic, whatnot whatnot.

I made this confusing for myself but it’ll all work out.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
